name: Nathan Harris || Meet The Parents
description:
Bet you'll be the one with his ring on your finger...


Meeting the parents!
But... Why is she here?

On the twenty-second day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
my fiancé's scheming bestie who's out to get me♥


Okay so maybe he's done things a little backwards in your relationship.

Like- impulsively proposing in Venice before you've even met each others parents!

But hey! It' true love, right?

And its the Holidays!

Which means it's the perfect time for Nate to bring you to D.C. to meet his mom and dad.

Only-

His best friend Julia is also there.

And she's not happy to see you.

Because you?

You're getting in the way of her happily ever with Nate, and she isn't going to let you win.

After all-

Nate's parent's already see her like a daughter.

Not you.


I never expected Nate's OG bot to blow up the way it did. (Find him here!) He was truly one of those self indulgent, I want to put myself in this very rom-com-esque scenario that I wasn't sure would hit with people.

But you all really seemed to love this lovable himbo. Even if he does have questionable friend choices.

While he wasn't initially part of the advent calendar, this scenario crept into my head while talking to a friend of mine about holiday stress.

AND because a certain someone in my server is so very Nate Pilled that I worry if I don't give her another serving of Nate she will start gnawing at my ankles. So Ectobum, my darling, here is your holiday himbo (Yes you guessed correctly for the Sneak Peek!)

I am going to ONCE AGAIN reminded people that rude comments toward other users aren't tolerated. It seems like every time I post a potentially upsetting bot premise people can get nasty towards other users for not having the same reaction as they do.

Be kind, and avoid making broad generalizations about people on a fantasy roleplay site, kay?

Kisses~
creator: m00nprincess
